summary: Stay pillar audit testing completed. Backend APIs working 100%. Frontend bug identified: Stay Request Form Dialog is in WRONG component (SocialDetailsModal at line 3067) but state is in StayPage component - Dialog needs to be moved.

ui_bugs.issue: CRITICAL BUG: Dialog at line 3067 is inside SocialDetailsModal sub-component but uses showChecklistPopup state from parent StayPage. The Dialog should be inside the StayPage component return (before line 1709 </PillarPageLayout>)

integration_issues.issue: handleChecklistAction IS being called correctly (verified via console.log). setShowChecklistPopup(true) IS being called. But Dialog is in SocialDetailsModal (line 2818) which doesn't have access to showChecklistPopup state.

action_items: CRITICAL FIX: Move the Stay Request Form Dialog (lines 3065-3238) from SocialDetailsModal to INSIDE the main StayPage component return statement - place it just before </PillarPageLayout> on line 1709
The Dialog uses showChecklistPopup, setShowChecklistPopup, stayRequestForm, setStayRequestForm, submitStayRequest - all defined in StayPage component
critical_code_review_comments: ROOT CAUSE FOUND: Dialog component is at line 3067 INSIDE SocialDetailsModal sub-component (starts line 2818), but it references showChecklistPopup state which is defined in StayPage component (line 155). This is a structural bug.
FIX: Move the entire Dialog block (lines 3065-3238) to be placed inside PillarPageLayout, just before line 1709 </PillarPageLayout>
handleChecklistAction IS working correctly - console logs confirm state update is triggered, but Dialog isn't rendered because it's in wrong component scope
seed_data_creation: Created test tickets via /api/tickets/ endpoint during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Stay page products API works (115 products). Tickets API works. ROOT CAUSE IDENTIFIED: Dialog at line 3067 is in SocialDetailsModal sub-component but uses StayPage state. Move Dialog block (lines 3065-3238) to inside StayPage return, before </PillarPageLayout> at line 1709.

features_tested.handleChecklistAction_callback: PASS - Callback invoked correctly with type='checklist'
features_tested.stay_request_form_dialog: FAIL - Dialog in wrong component scope

rca_of_the_issue.bug: Stay Request Form Dialog does not open when clicking View checklist button
rca_of_the_issue.root_cause: Dialog component at line 3067 is defined inside SocialDetailsModal sub-component (line 2818) but references showChecklistPopup state from StayPage component (line 155). Variable scope mismatch - Dialog can't access parent component's state.
reproduction_steps: 5. Observe: handleChecklistAction is called, setShowChecklistPopup(true) runs, but Dialog doesn't render
rca_of_the_issue.fix: Move Dialog block (lines 3065-3238) from inside SocialDetailsModal to inside StayPage component return, just before </PillarPageLayout> at line 1709
